data.name: UnHolY ToRturEr
data.detailed_description:
UnholY CreatioN's NEW GAME!!


關於此遊戲

■故事

此處乃惡魔的巢穴……在地底深處的監獄裡，一名女神官被關押於此。

名叫瑪麗安娜的她，擁有著強大的神聖之力，據說這同時也是作為魔神顯現的容器所需要具備的素質。

為了黑化做為容器後補的女神官，身兼拷問官以及調教師的半黑精靈族「維拉」，對瑪麗安娜開始了各種殘酷的調教……

■本作概要

本作是以姐妹社團 「Unholy ☆ Production」所發行的同人誌為基礎，改編發展而成的原創調教SLG遊戲。

玩家將在遊戲中扮演調教師「維拉」，對女主角瑪麗安娜進行各種各樣的調教訓練。

・Live2D動畫

所有觸摸，調教情景將採用Live2D動畫。在刺激的調教下，玩家可以對各種乳搖，體液飛散等情景進行視覺享受。

・調教開發

通過調教而取得的點數，可用於魔物以及道具的開發，也可以用來開啟行的調教選項。

・多重路線劇本

通過調教訓練，個身體部位的性感帶開發之，經驗值以及其他數值將產生變化。按數值變化的不同，將可以開啟不同的對話劇本，並到達不同的解決。

data.short_description: 成為黑暗精靈「維拉」，訓練你俘虜的女神墮入黑暗！ 點擊式訓練模擬遊戲，有多種結局，會根據訓練內容改變！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Geforce 900
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: UnHolY ToRturEr
data.detailed_description:
UnholY CreatioN's NEW GAME!!


About the Game

■Story

This is the dungeon of the demons...... A priestess was brought into this prison that spreads across the underground.

Her name is Marianne, and she, who holds a strong sacred power, is said to hold the qualities become a vessel for demon manifestation.

The torturer and trainer “Vera”, who is Half Dark Elf, begins the rigorous process to stain the goddess into the world of darkness.

■Introduction

You will become the trainer “Vera” and do various trainings to the heroine Marianne.

・ Live2D animation

All the training scenes use Live2D video through touch. Throughout each intense training sessions, you can enjoy smooth animations such as bounching boobs and bodily liquids splashing around.

・ Training development

Using the points gained from training, you will be able to develop monsters and tools to conduct new training.

・ Story branch

Depending on the training, the development level, experience value and special status of each sensual area changes. Depending on the status, new conversation events and training will appear, and the ending will branch off differently as well.

data.short_description: Become the dark elf “Vera” and train the captured priestess to fall into darkness! This clicker-style training simulation features multiple endings depending on the training content!
data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

Minimum:

  • DirectX: Version 10

  • Processor: Intel Core i5 6000

  • Graphics: Geforce 900
  • DirectX: Version 10
